name: Amphibia RPG
description:
AMPHIBIA RPG | Amphibia ______ `Amphibia is a mostly rural tropical marshland on a planet that is shaped like a lily pad leaf, based on the aquatic plant usually associated with frogs. It is inhabited by every species of sentient amphibians—frogs, toads, salamanders, olms, axolotls, and ewts.` ______ *Second RPG bot I made. Still working on it. Probably needs some tweaking. Gonna have to specify if you want to play as a human or a non human character. Anyway, have fun. Also, reviews and comments help to improve this bot. I ain't a mind reader.*

Update (12/09/2025): Complete Overhaul of personality and scenario
creator: RookBi
